g.text: 01 / BLACK-SKY-SENTINEL
Real-time satellite data visualization platform for monitoring atmospheric and geospatial events.
Renders live orbital data with an interactive globe interface and event-driven alert system.
HTML5 · JAVASCRIPT · SATELLITE DATA · GEOSPATIAL · VISUALIZATION
02 / DIGITAL BUILDING FOOTPRINT IDENTIFICATION
ML pipeline for detecting and extracting building footprints from satellite imagery using deep learning.
Processes high-resolution GeoTIFF imagery with semantic segmentation to produce precise vector outputs.
PYTHON · TENSORFLOW · SEMANTIC SEGMENTATION · GEOTIFF · GDAL · ML
03 / ATHIRE
Full-stack job portal platform connecting employers and candidates with smart matching and application tracking.
Features real-time notifications, role-based dashboards, and a REST API with JWT authentication.
REACT · NODE.JS · EXPRESS · JAVASCRIPT · REST API · JWT
04 / PY-RUNNER
Lightweight Python game engine built on Pygame with a scene manager, sprite system, and event loop.
Designed as a minimal framework for building 2D games without the overhead of larger engines.
PYTHON · PYGAME · GAME ENGINE · 2D · SCENE MANAGEMENT
05 / ML CROP YIELD CLASSIFICATION
Machine learning model for classifying and predicting crop yield outcomes from agricultural sensor data.
Applies feature engineering and ensemble methods to surface actionable insights from raw field measurements.
PYTHON · SCIKIT-LEARN · ML · DATA ANALYSIS · CLASSIFICATION · AGRICULTURE
06 / SCENE CHANGE DETECTION — NeRF (in progress)
Research project applying Neural Radiance Fields to detect and quantify scene changes from multi-temporal imagery.
Explores 3D scene reconstruction pipelines for identifying structural differences over time at the pixel and voxel level.
PYTHON · NERF · NEURAL RENDERING · 3D RECONSTRUCTION · COMPUTER VISION · RESEARCH
